Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Opposition To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Jason Honaker, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Retail Venture, LLC.
Della Rhinehart, judgment debtor in Propria Persona.

After hearing, The claim of exemption is Denied; funds currentrly withheld shall be released to the judgment creditor; Sheriff to withhold $250.00 per pay period. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
